texto: Believe me, Dirk; I've been in this game a long time and I know what I'm talking about. I've seen it all; wife swapping during a coach tour of Norfolk churches, orgies at a pensioners' whist drive in Somerset; a mystery weekend where the real mystery turned out to be, what was Mr Preston doing hanging upside down in the wardrobe with an apple in his mouth.
explicacao: Citação de Stuart Bone sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Believe me, Dirk; I've been in this game a long time and I know what I'm talking about. I've seen…” articula reflexao, humour, mystery em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
